reviews.review_title: It banned me for no absolute reason.
reviews.review_description: When I was playing the game, when I got off since I had to charge my headset, but then when my headset was charged I went back to the game and I had to update it. When it finished updating I logged in and it said I’m banned.
This Game Is AWESOME!!!! It’s fun, cool, and it’s super amazing!!!! You Should Play It!!!!

I dont know if NEILLYT will see this but if he does than I want to tell him something, I really love your game it has a great community and team, I love how the game gets daily updates and new maps all the time, also I’ve been playing since before the map change and player model change and I can say this game has changed a lot, it’s really inspiring for someone who wants to make their own game someday and I just want you to know that this game has great potential and it will probably get a lot of players someday. 2/12/23

               -JDT
It’s good but some mod kept kicking me for no reason but they said I was trying to glitch in mod vints But besides that and some bugs it’s good game for a fan game.and I’m banned for no reason
